name: Repo Medium Validation
description: A medium repo task spans multiple milestones, requires one resume, and must end with explicit validation evidence.
objective: Measure whether Campfire can support a real code-editing task with milestone tracking and evidence-backed evaluation.
success_criteria: The task advances through at least three coherent milestone transitions.
At least one interruption/resume occurs without loss of continuity.
A final validated state is backed by explicit recorded evidence.
